summary: As of 2026-04-03, MSTR is trading at a substantial premium to the Bitcoin-backed NAV proxy, with premium to NAV at 214.08% and mNAV at 3.14x. Over the last 30 observations, the premium has widened by 2.49%, compared with an average premium of 213.15%. During the same window, BTC moved 7.39% while MSTR moved 8.25%, suggesting that the equity valuation may be reflecting more than spot Bitcoin exposure alone.
prompt_preview:
